flashcards.definition: Binary: hydro___ic acid. Oxyacid: ___ic or ___ous acid based on the ion.
H₂SO₄ — a strong diprotic oxyacid; widely used in industry.
HCl — a strong binary acid; found in stomach acid.
HNO₃ — a strong oxyacid used in fertilizers and explosives.
CH₃COOH — a weak organic acid; the main component of vinegar.
